solutions.solution: (C) Clearly, A is a male and B is a female. Now, B has as many sisters as brothers. So, B has one sister. Hence, there are one brother and two sisters in this family.

(C) Let us draw the family diagram
Vineet's grandfather
    |
   Son
    |
Vineet's father
    |
  Daughter
Lady → Sister → Vineet
         Vineet is the
         brother of lady
Clearly, the only son of Vineet's grandfather is the father of Vineet and daughter of Vineet's father is the sister of Vineet. Hence, Vineet is the brother of that lady.

(C) Let us draw the family diagram
Man's → Man's wife → Man's wife's → Man's wife's
mother  Father     Brother      Sister-in-law
                     |
                   Son
Man's Son → Cousin → Boy
Hence, man's son is the cousin of that boy.

(C) Let us draw the family tree
Anurag's father
    |
  Father
    |
Anurag → Married couple → Anurag's wife
    |
  Daughter
    |
   Girl → Mother
The daughter of only child of Anurag's father will be daughter of Anurag. Thus, Anurag's wife will be the mother of this girl.

(C) Let us draw the family diagram
Kesav → Sister → Simran → Prem
    |
   Son
    |
  Sunil → Maruti → Sister → Sita
              |
            Cousin
From above family diagram, Sunil is cousin of Maruti.

(C) Let us draw the family diagram
         Married
    D → couple → A
    |
  Father
    |
C → B → B's husband → Brother → C
Clearly, A is D's wife.

(C) Let us draw the family diagram
         Grand mother or grand father
    C ←
         Daughter
         |
    A's mother ← Sister → B
         |
         A ← Sister → D ← Sister → E
Now, it can be concluded that C is either grandmother or grandfather of E.
